groupings.title: Core Engineering
groupings.description: Independent but interoperable skills for repository mapping, domain modeling, review, and categorized Git delivery.

groupings.title: ChatGPT Collaboration
groupings.description: Ask ChatGPT for an explicitly authorized independent review, research result, visual exploration, or decision challenge.

groupings.title: Product Definition
groupings.description: Skill for implementation-ready product specifications and authorized product-fact updates.

groupings.title: Design
groupings.description: Skill for designing concrete Feature UI and, only when shared tokens, component semantics, variants, or visual language change, maintaining a repository-owned Design System profile.

groupings.title: Implementation
groupings.description: Skills that own requested source-code implementation and refactoring within their domains.

groupings.title: Specialist Audit
groupings.description: Read-only specialist skills for frontend, Rust, and scoped security assessment.

groupings.title: Runtime Operations
groupings.description: Skills for browser and desktop-client operation with state-safe evidence collection.

groupings.title: Writing Extension
groupings.description: Skills for personal technical writing, editing, and publication-ready prose.
